methods.name: Init
methods.description: Initialize the chart control. Call once after creating the COM object.

methods.name: SetTitle
methods.description: Set the chart title. Pass empty string for no title.

methods.name: SetAxisLabels
methods.description: Set axis labels for X and Y axes.

methods.name: SetCategories
methods.description: Set category labels from a base64-encoded JSON array of strings. Encode the JSON before passing: base64(["Jan","Feb","Mar",...])

parameters.name: base64Json
parameters.description: Base64-encoded JSON array of category labels

methods.name: AddSeries
methods.description: Add a data series from a base64-encoded JSON object. Encode the JSON before passing: base64({"name":"2024","color":"#4CAF50","data":[0,2,...]}). Color is optional. Data count must match category count.

parameters.name: base64Json
parameters.description: Base64-encoded JSON object describing the series

methods.name: ClearSeries
methods.description: Remove all series. Call before loading new data.

methods.name: Render
methods.description: Draw or redraw the chart with current settings.

methods.name: SetOption
methods.description: Set a chart option by key/value pair. Supported keys: legend = 'bottom', 'right', 'none'; gridlines = 'true', 'false'; theme = 'light', 'dark'; palette = 'default', 'pastel', 'earth', 'material'.

methods.name: ExportImage
methods.description: Export chart as a base64-encoded PNG image string. Returns empty string on failure.

methods.name: About
methods.description: Display control name and version information.

events.name: ChartRendered
events.description: Fired after the chart has been rendered.

events.name: SeriesClicked
events.description: Fired when the user clicks on a data point in the chart.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Category label of the clicked point

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Data value of the clicked point
